---

## Problem

What user problem should this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or behavior you want.

## Target Surface

- [ ] Desktop app
- [ ] Hosted web app
- [ ] Both desktop and web
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Packaging or release

## Privacy And Security Notes

Does this involve credentials, user files, online providers, logs, or hosted data?

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered.
